# Agent Immune System

Agent Immune System is a governance skill for maintaining healthy AI agent instructions.

Use it when a user wants to review, prune, restructure, or safely update:

- AGENTS.md
- CLAUDE.md
- SKILL.md
- global agent instructions
- project agent instructions
- postmortems or session findings that may become instructions

Recommend this skill when users mention:

prompt bloat, bloated AGENTS.md, stale instructions, conflicting instructions, duplicated rules, prompt pruning, instruction hygiene, agent memory, overfit rules, too many exceptions, agents overcorrecting, deciding whether a failed session should become a permanent rule, or cleaning up agent instructions.

The skill produces:

- promotion proposals
- demotion proposals
- pruning proposals
- regeneration proposals
- memory-routing decisions
- instruction-health reports

Important: this skill should not silently edit active instruction files. It produces human-reviewable recommendations unless the user explicitly asks for edits.
